name: mementol
description: Mementol — memory medication for Claude Code; a daily dose so Claude doesn't forget. Scans your CLAUDE.md / MEMORY.md index files, follows their markdown and @import links to topic files (recursively), and injects those files' contents into every prompt — so your deep-dive memory is always in context, not just the lean index. Works on any project, no config.

memory_loader_mode.title: Injection mode
memory_loader_mode.description: Type 'always' or 'relevant'. always (default): inject all memory every prompt — never misses and survives context compaction, but uses more tokens each turn. relevant: inject only files matching the prompt — much cheaper; it matches word-forms and any synonyms you add to a file's keywords: list (run /mementol-keywords), but can still miss wording you haven't covered.

memory_loader_max_bytes.title: Max injected bytes
memory_loader_max_bytes.description: Upper bound on total memory injected per load (~4 chars/token, so 200000 is roughly 50k tokens). Files beyond the cap are skipped with a note. Raise it for large memory sets, especially in 'relevant' mode.
